title: Expanded Swords
description: This mod will add 12 swords to spice up your journey!
body:
This mod adds:

Amethyst, Bamboo, Blaze, Copper, Emerald, Lapis Lazuli, Obsidian, Quartz and Slime Swords into the game!

Using these swords can do various amount of things, from giving you Speed to being able to fire fireballs at whatever you want! These Swords will make your Minecraft fights easier or help you with resources.
